name: Orange Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift dry ingredients together. Add butter and milk, beat for 2 minutes at medium speed on an electric mixer. Add almond extract and egg whites, beat for 2 more minutes. Bake in two 9-inch layer pans for 35-40 minutes.
Orange Filling: Mix ingredients together in a saucepan and bring to a rolling boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Chill before using.
Frosting: Mix thoroughly in a saucepan and place over heat. Stir constantly until sugar dissolves. Wipe crystals from sides of pan as necessary. Boil without stirring to 244-246°F or a firm ball stage. Pour syrup slowly into stiffly beaten egg whites. Add vanilla. Beat until frosting reaches desired spreading consistency.
